summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Şakarlar SW app. All 13 backend API tests pass. All frontend flows verified: product list, search, speed mode, navigation, admin panel CRUD.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated shadow* style props (should use boxShadow) - console warnings only, not breaking

critical_code_review_comments: Admin panel missing back button header - user sees only 'Yönetim Paneli' text without a back button (no navigation header). However router.back() works via browser back.
No header/navigation bar shown on admin page in web preview (SafeAreaView without expo-router stack header). Minor UX issue.
seed_data_creation: 30 products seeded by backend on startup. TEST product created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified and working. Backend APIs fully functional. Turkish fuzzy search works (cop → Çöp Poşeti). Speed mode toggle, barcode scan navigation, product detail, admin CRUD all working.
